title: Create: Andesite Encased Elytra
description: Elytra combination with Create mod "Andesite Casing"
body:
# **Andesite Encased Elytra**
For all the players that play Create mod and like using elytra but don't like the Vanilla texture, I'm presenting you with this resourcepack!

![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a7cf03d6b4ecb40a3842c2954135df33255423e_0.webp)

This resource pack completely reimagines the elytra by basing its design on the iconic Andesite Casing block texture from the Create mod. If you've ever wished your wings could match the sleek, industrial look of your mechanical contraptions, this is exactly what you've been waiting for.

### **Design Backstory:**

The new elytra texture directly incorporates the distinctive andesite casing pattern, featuring that grey stone border with subtle spruce plank? finish . Every detail has been adapted to fit the elytra's shape while maintaining the authentic Create aesthetic. The result is a pair of wings that genuinely looks like they were assembled from the same materials you use to build your machines.

### **Why You'll Love It:**

Perfect Integration: Matches your Create builds seamlessly
Consistent Aesthetic: No more jarring purple wings breaking your industrial theme
Lore-Friendly: Looks like actual Create machinery you could craft
Lightweight: Simple texture replacement, no performance impact
Whether you're flying between your factories or showcasing your mechanical empire, these andesite-cased wings will make you feel like a true Create engineer. Finally, an elytra that respects your dedication to the industrial revolution!

**Not a fan of Andesite? I also made [Brass Encased Elytra](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/create-brass-encased-elytra) Resource Pack**

![Pack icona](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c18433ec100820957d63dd26ad959c5d76d009c1.png)
